channel.title: DRMN Blog — Sleep & Focus Sounds
channel.description: Guides on white noise, sleep sounds, and focus audio for better rest and concentration.

item.title: Rain Sounds for Focus: Why Steady Rain Helps You Concentrate
item.description: The same rain that helps you sleep can sharpen focus at your desk— if you choose the right texture, volume, and timing. Here is how to use rainfall for real concentration.

item.title: Rain Sounds for Sleep: Why They Work and How to Use Them
item.description: Rain loops feel natural at bedtime, but the wrong track can loop awkwardly or stay too bright. Here is how to pick rain sounds that actually help you rest.

item.title: Sleep Music That Actually Works: How to Pick Sounds for Better Rest
item.description: Rain sounds and piano playlists feel relaxing, yet some nights your mind stays wide awake. Here is how to choose audio that supports sleep instead of competing with it.

item.title: Can White Noise Really Help You Sleep Better? What the Research Says
item.description: White noise can mask outside sounds and cue your brain for sleep, but studies disagree. Here is a balanced look at benefits, risks, and safer use.

item.title: White Noise for Sleep: What It Is, Why It Works, and How to Use It
item.description: White noise masks sudden sounds that wake you at night. Here is how it works, how loud it should be, and how to build a simple bedtime routine around it.
